notes: Post meta for comments is resolved from Postgres only.
Numeric MAX startapp values such as 22 or 23 are resolved through ak_posts title fallback.
The comment screen must not show default duplicate chips before DB meta is loaded.
The first chip is static: Начало обсуждения. Only the second chip is dynamic: default АдминКИТ or custom CTA.
Root loader restores BUILD_VERSION/RUNTIME_VERSION after legacy nested loaders so debug ping cannot fall back to CC6.8.3.
